subcodes.first_line: O true friends of 'Abdu'l-Bahá, that blessed village was ever engaged in defending itself against an ignorant people [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یاران حقیقی عبدالبهاء آن قریه مبارکه همیشه با قوم جهول بمدافعه می پرداخت
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @martyrs and martyrdom, @prayer for specific individuals; groups
